message:
feat(stdlib): add pure Python internal modules (_py_abc, _pydatetime, _codecs_*, etc.)

Add 17 internal C accelerator and pure Python fallback modules:
- _py_abc, _pydatetime, _pydecimal, _pyio, _pylong (pure Python fallbacks)
- _compat_pickle, _multibytecodec (compatibility modules)
- _codecs_cn, _codecs_hk, _codecs_iso2022, _codecs_jp, _codecs_kr, _codecs_tw (CJK codecs)
- _crypt, _gdbm (Unix-specific modules)
- _frozen_importlib, _frozen_importlib_external (frozen import machinery)
